source_scope.coverage_note: Representative sample-level capability map over four domains, based on package metadata and selected canonical SKILL.md files. The capability_domains below are representative clusters only; they do not exhaustively cover all 24 upstream Skills and must not be promoted as a full suite map.

capability_domains_scope.coverage_note: The four domains are representative sample domains used to test the ReaderLab capability-map contract. They are not a full inventory or complete route table for the 24-Skill suite.

suite_overview.job_family: dontbesilent business toolkit for routing, business diagnosis, content expression, publishing, diagnosis state, reports, and content asset engineering.
primary_users: 使用 Codex/Claude/Grok 等 Agent 工具的工作流搭建者
not_for: Legal, tax, medical, or regulated professional advice
Generic summarization with no dbs task signal
Changing canonical package files during ReaderLab review
Human acceptance of ReaderLab reading quality
route_summary: Start with /dbs when the user does not know which dbs skill should handle the task.
Use diagnosis skills when the problem needs framing or dissolution before solution generation.
Use content expression and publishing skills when the content object exists and needs title, format, resonance, hook, or WeChat publishing treatment.
Use state and content engineering skills when the work must persist across sessions or turn many local materials into a reusable system.

capability_domains.name: 入口路由与任务后导航
capability_domains.owned_job: Decide which dbs skill should run before a task, and recommend the next dbs skill after a previous result.
trigger_signals: User says /dbs, /商业, 帮我看看, 下一步怎么走
User has a fuzzy business or content request and does not name a specific dbs skill
A previous dbs skill has produced a diagnosis/report/list and the user asks what next
near_neighbor_exclusions: Does not generate content deliverables itself
Does not save or report state itself
method_atoms: Detect whether previous dbs-* output exists in the conversation
Use Mode A routing table before a task
Use Mode B navigation map after a task
Explain 2-3 next options with reasons when user has not chosen a path
required_inputs: Previous dbs-* output for Mode B
output_contract: One selected dbs skill route or 2-3 reasoned next-step recommendations
A short reason why the selected route matches the user signal
verification: Chosen route appears in the route table or navigation map
The response does not analyze the business problem itself
If the request is out of suite scope, it says so and names supported areas

basis: The entry SKILL.md explicitly says it only routes and contains route/navigation tables.

review_items.question: Some user intents may match multiple downstream skills; route priority should be reviewed with real conversations.

capability_domains.name: 诊断、问题消解与可验证问题框定
capability_domains.owned_job: Turn fuzzy, wrong, or underspecified business questions into dissolved problems, valid questions, or structured diagnosis reports.
trigger_signals: User says 帮我看看商业模式, 诊断一下我的业务, 我有个商业问题
The request contains undefined terms such as 适合, 值得, 高级, 赛道
The user appears to ask for a solution before checking assumptions, logic, facts, or information sufficiency
near_neighbor_exclusions: Does not handle pure emotional counseling beyond boundary routing
Does not answer standard information lookup questions with the full diagnosis funnel
Does not replace legal, tax, or other professional advice
method_atoms: Choose between consultation mode and checkup mode
Classify incoming issue as information, emotion, or complex problem
Run language trap, assumption, logic, fact, and sufficiency checks one layer at a time
Only answer the rare surviving valid question or produce a structured checkup report
required_inputs: Business model details for checkup mode: product, price, buyer, acquisition, delivery, revenue
output_contract: A clear dissolution reason, valid answer, or diagnostic report
Explicit phase result and what changed about the original question
Recommended next dbs skill only when supported by the diagnosis
verification: The output names which layer dissolved or validated the question
The output does not skip ahead to advice when language or assumptions are unresolved
A checkup report includes the declared diagnostic sections

basis: The diagnosis SKILL.md provides explicit phases, funnel layers, and report sections.

review_items.question: Boundary with /dbs-good-question and /dbs-goal should be tested on ambiguous user requests.

capability_domains.name: 内容表达、标题公式与发布排版
capability_domains.owned_job: Help an existing topic or markdown artifact become better expressed, traceable to formulas, and publishable in target surfaces.
trigger_signals: User asks for 小红书标题, 标题公式, 起标题
User asks for 公众号 HTML, 微信排版, 生成公众号版本
User has a content object and wants expression, style, or publishing treatment rather than business diagnosis
near_neighbor_exclusions: Title formula skill is not a freeform title generator
WeChat HTML skill does not rewrite article arguments or diagnose content quality
Publishing conversion should not be used when the user has no source markdown/content
method_atoms: Extract topic and industry from the user's input
Match formula categories before generating titles
Require each title to trace to a formula number
For WeChat HTML, ask or infer style mode, then convert markdown with defined style rules
required_inputs: Topic and industry for title work
Markdown content or file path for WeChat HTML work
output_contract: Formula-backed title options with formula ID, original example, and short reason
Generated HTML files or preview index for WeChat publishing when applicable
verification: Every generated title cites a formula number
At least three trigger categories are considered when matching formulas
Generated HTML follows supported markdown conversion and chosen style mode

basis: Title formula and WeChat publishing files were read directly.
Other content expression skills such as hook, resonate, spread, and content were not deeply mapped in this review pack.

review_items.question: Should hook/resonate/spread/content be split into additional subdomains in a full review?

capability_domains.name: 状态记忆、报告与内容资产工程
capability_domains.owned_job: Persist diagnosis state, merge confirmed snapshots into reports, and build reusable local content systems when content volume and boundaries justify it.
trigger_signals: User says 保存, 记下来, 这个结论留着
User says 出报告, 打包, 整理一份, 给合伙人看的
User wants to turn a large local content archive into a reusable content structure
near_neighbor_exclusions: Report does not summarize from raw conversation without saved snapshots
Content-system does not start heavy engineering when volume or boundaries are insufficient
method_atoms: Check whether there is something real to save before writing a snapshot
Write local structured markdown snapshots with fixed frontmatter and sections
Merge snapshots by project and time into reports without unsupported invention
For content-system, audit volume and boundaries before scaffolding, copy originals instead of rewriting them, then process sample units before scaling
required_inputs: Project name or cwd-derived project for state files
Content source directories, inclusion/exclusion boundaries, and priority material type for content-system
output_contract: Timestamped markdown report that cites saved snapshots
Content engineering scaffold, source registry, unit drafts, maps, and processing state when gates pass
verification: Save output uses the required frontmatter and six sections
Report output is derived from dbs-save files and never overwrites older reports
Content-system reaches usable state only after scaffold, rules, copied sources, sample units, maps, and checks exist

basis: State and content engineering files were read directly.
Tool scripts under dbs-content-system were listed but not deeply audited in this pack.

review_items.question: Content-system tool scripts should be separately reviewed before declaring operational completeness.

cross_skill_routes.when: User has a concrete business question or business model diagnosis request.
cross_skill_routes.uncertainty: May overlap with /dbs-good-question when the main issue is problem statement quality.

cross_skill_routes.when: Business model direction is adequate and the next bottleneck is content execution or publishing.
cross_skill_routes.uncertainty: Some content requests still need /dbs-content before title or HTML publishing.

cross_skill_routes.when: The diagnosis should be saved, reported, or turned into a durable content system.
cross_skill_routes.uncertainty: Saving/reporting requires existing confirmed state; content-system requires volume and boundary gates.

reader_routes.title: 第一次理解
steps: 先读 route-core，理解 /dbs 是入口路由而非万能分析器。
再读 diagnosis domain，理解问题消解如何避免直接给错答案。
然后读 content-expression domain，区分标题、内容表达和发布排版。
最后读 state-and-content-engineering，理解什么时候需要长期状态或内容系统。

reader_routes.title: 选择能力
steps: 如果不知道用哪个工具，回到 route-core。
如果问题本身可能是错的，走 diagnosis-and-problem-framing。
如果已有内容对象，走 content-expression-and-publishing。
如果需要跨会话保存、报告或内容资产工程，走 state-and-content-engineering。

reader_routes.title: 验证输出
steps: 检查输出是否遵守对应 skill 的角色边界。
检查是否有可追溯来源、公式编号、快照字段或 scaffold 状态。
检查是否把机器产物冒充人工接受。

basis: Capability domains are source-backed by directly read package files.
Coverage is intentionally sample-level and says so.
known_uncertainties: Full suite contains additional skills not mapped as separate domains here.
Route conflicts require real user transcript review.

review_items.question: 补全 24 Skills: should a future full pack map every upstream Skill separately, including /dbs-good-question, /dbs-goal, hook/resonate/spread/content, and any scripts/tests-linked capabilities?
cross_skill_routes: representative routes here are not enough to prove route priority across all overlapping dbs skills; real transcript cases and all SKILL.md files are needed.
Should content-system scripts be audited before claiming executable completeness?

旧 LifeAtlas global-map 冲突 / distillation full 冲突: before any LifeAtlas write, the old dbs global-map/distillation artifacts that imply full coverage must be reviewed or retired so this sample-level capability map is not mixed with obsolete full claims.
